name: Ember Writ
specialty: Masterful fire mages, known for their precision and destructive power, setting them apart in the dangerous world of the Undercity.

members.name: Elysia Nimbuswhisper
members.note: A scar runs down her left cheek, a remnant of a failed mission that left her team and her old life behind

members.name: Thorin Ironflame
members.note: His eyes glow a fiery red when he channels his magical powers, a sight that instills fear in their enemies

members.name: Jaxx Fyrebringer
members.note: His horns are dyed a bright red and curled into the shape of flames, a mark of his devotion to the Argent Blades

visual: They wear black leather armors adorned with silver flames, carrying staffs topped with crystal fireballs. They move with a sense of unity, their bodies a flurry of fluid motion in public.
reputation_note: Whispers of a powerful and deadly group loyal to the Argent Blades spread throughout the Undercity, a warning to potential enemies
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a inter-guild-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+2/5)
